page.title: Connect AI Agents
page.description: Add your MCP endpoint to any AI client below. Once connected, your homelab tools will be discovered automatically.
page.restartNote: When you connect a new service, most clients pick up the new tools instantly. Claude Code, Cursor, and Copilot cache tools at startup — restart them to see newly added tools.

note.label: Note:
note.body: ChatGPT requires a publicly accessible endpoint. Use the included Caddy config or a tunnel service like Cloudflare Tunnel if your server is local-only.
